center.name: 乔治·肖
center.summary: 乔治·肖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括麝鴨、黄腹金鹃、髻鸠等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2016 |title=Aegotheles cristatus |article-number=e.T22689555A93236849 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2016-3.RLTS.T22689555A93236849.en}} | image = Australian owlet-nightjar A22I9928.jpg | image_caption= In New South Wales | genus = Aegotheles | species = cristatus | authority = (Shaw, 1790) | range_map = Australian Owlet-nightjar ebird data map.png | range_map_caption = Global range }} The Australian owlet-nightjar (Aegotheles cristatus) is a nocturnal bird found in open woodland across Australia and in southern New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|A brown thornbill The brown thornbill (Acanthiza pusilla) is a passerine bird usually found in eastern and south-eastern Australia, including Tasmania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Congo pied hornbill (Lophoceros fasciatus) is a bird of the hornbill family, a family of tropical near-passerine birds found in the Old World. The Congo pied hornbill is native to the Congo Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-tailed comet (Sappho sparganurus) is a medium-sized hummingbird belonging to tribe Lesbiini of subfamily Lesbiinae, the "coquettes". It is found in Argentina and Bolivia and possibly Chile and Peru

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The turquoise parrot (Neophema pulchella) is a species of parrot in the genus Neophema native to Eastern Australia, from southeastern Queensland, through New South Wales and into North-Eastern Victoria

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |title=A budgerigar Melopsittacus undulatus from the Pliocene of Riversleigh, North-western Queensland |journal=Emu|date=1998 |volume=98 |issue=1 |pages=32–35 |doi=10.1071/MU98004|bibcode=1998EmuAO..98...32B }}}} | image = Budgerigar-male-strzelecki-qld.jpg | image_caption = Blue cere indicates male | image2 = Budgerigar-strzelecki-qld.jpg | image2_caption = Flaking brown cere indicates female in breeding condition | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | display_parents = 3 | genus = Melopsittacus | parent_authority = Gould, 1840 | species = undulatus | authority = (Shaw, 1805) | range_map = Budgerigar_range_map.png | range_map_caption = The range of the Budgerigar Native range: green Introduced range: light green }} The budgerigar ( ; Melopsittacus undulatus), also known as the common parakeet, shell parakeet or budgie ( ), is a small, long-tailed, seed-eating parrot native to Australia
